mapper.select: SELECT FROM cs_user WHERE deleted = FALSE ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM cs_user WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND lower(username) = lower(#{username}) AND deleted = FALSE LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM cs_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = FALSE LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE cs_user SET password = #{password}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = FALSE

UPDATE cs_user SET gender = #{gender}, real_name = #{realName}, age = #{age}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE cs_user SET avatar_path = #{avatarPath}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE cs_user SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = FALSE
